description: CompositionRed T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, short sleeves and graphic print on the chestFitRegularWash careMachine wash at 40 degrees with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleachTumble dry normal or line dryWarm iron; do not iron on decorationsWear your brand with pride and relive the glory of the air force as reflected in this T-shirt from locomotive. Crafted from soft cotton fabric to offer exemplary comfort which, combined with the stylish graphic print, makes this tee a great addition to your casual wardrobe. Pair it with jeans and sports shoes.Model statisticsThe product is a size L on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
